Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.util

Class FlixelColor

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.util.FlixelColor
public final class FlixelColor extends Object
Mutable color wrapper that owns a single Color instance for stable tinting and tween endpoints without per-frame allocations.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    FlixelColor()
    Creates a new color with the default white color.
    FlixelColor(float r, float g, float b, float a)
    Creates a new color with the given RGBA values.
    FlixelColor(int rgba8888)
    Creates a new color from the given packed RGBA8888 value.
    FlixelColor(int r, int g, int b, int a)
    Creates a new color with the given RGBA values.
    FlixelColor(@NotNull com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Color source)
    Creates a new color from the given Color value.

  • Constructor Details

    • FlixelColor

      public FlixelColor()
      Creates a new color with the default white color.

    • FlixelColor

      public FlixelColor(int r, int g, int b, int a)
      Creates a new color with the given RGBA values. Values must be in the range 0-255.
      Parameters:
      r - The red component.
      g - The green component.
      b - The blue component.
      a - The alpha component.

    • FlixelColor

      public FlixelColor(float r, float g, float b, float a)
      Creates a new color with the given RGBA values. Values must be in the range 0-1.
      Parameters:
      r - The red component.
      g - The green component.
      b - The blue component.
      a - The alpha component.

    • FlixelColor

      public FlixelColor(int rgba8888)
      Creates a new color from the given packed RGBA8888 value.
      Parameters:
      rgba8888 - The packed RGBA8888 value.

    • FlixelColor

      public FlixelColor(@NotNull @NotNull com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Color source)
      Creates a new color from the given Color value.
      Parameters:
      source - The Color value to copy.

    • set

      public FlixelColor set(int r, int g, int b, int a)
      Sets the color to the given RGBA values. Values must be in the range 0-255.
      Parameters:
      r - The red component.
      g - The green component.
      b - The blue component.
      a - The alpha component.
      Returns:
      this for chaining.

    • set

      public FlixelColor set(float r, float g, float b, float a)
      Sets the color to the given RGBA values. Values must be in the range 0-1.
      Parameters:
      r - The red component.
      g - The green component.
      b - The blue component.
      a - The alpha component.
      Returns:
      this for chaining.

    • set

      public FlixelColor set(@NotNull @NotNull com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Color other)
      Sets the color to the given Color value.
      Parameters:
      other - The Color value to copy.
      Returns:
      this for chaining.

    • set

      public FlixelColor set(@NotNull @NotNull FlixelColor other)
      Sets the color to the given FlixelColor value.
      Parameters:
      other - The FlixelColor value to copy.
      Returns:
      this for chaining.

    • pack

      public int pack()

    • lerp

      public FlixelColor lerp(@NotNull @NotNull FlixelColor to, float t)
      Linearly interpolates between this color and to by t.
      Parameters:
      to - The color to interpolate to.
      t - The interpolation factor.
      Returns:
      this for chaining.

    • fromHsv

      public FlixelColor fromHsv(float h, float s, float v, float a)
      Mutates this color from HSV (h degrees, s/v 0–1), then sets alpha.
      Parameters:
      h - The hue.
      s - The saturation.
      v - The value.
      a - The alpha.
      Returns:
      this for chaining.
